info.title: LifeLink API
info.description: OpenAPI documentation for the LifeLink donation platform API. All routes are mounted at root paths.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Registration, login, email verification, password reset, 2FA, and token management for all roles

tags.name: Donor
tags.description: All donor-facing endpoints: profile, dashboard, urgent requests, appointments, donation history, rewards, badges, activity, settings, notifications, hospitals

tags.name: Hospital
tags.description: Hospital self-management: profile, blood bank, capacity, QR verification, request management

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Admin operations: user management, analytics, reward adjustments, system maintenance

get.summary: Get the authenticated user's activity timeline
get.description:
Returns a paginated, timestamped history of all user actions (donations, rewards, urgent responses, profile updates).
Supports optional filtering by activity type.
Results are sorted newest-first.

description.example: Donated 1 unit of A+ blood to Cairo Hospital

activities.title: Blood Donation Completed
activities.description: Donated 1 unit of A+ blood to Cairo Hospital

post.summary: Login for admin and superadmin accounts
post.description: Authenticate admin or superadmin user. Returns JWT token for subsequent requests

200.description: Admin login successful - returns JWT token

403.description: Admin key invalid or account not authorized

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated admin's profile information

get.summary: Get the system blood inventory summary

403.description: Cannot delete own account or insufficient role

isSystemRole.description: Whether this is a system role (cannot be modified)

400.description: Invalid payload - role and displayName are required

403.description: System roles cannot be created or modified

put.summary: Update role permissions - Only allows updating displayName, description, and permissions

displayName.description: Human-readable role name - CAN BE UPDATED

permissions.description: Role permissions object - CAN BE UPDATED

403.description: System roles (admin, superadmin, donor, hospital) cannot be modified
System roles (admin, superadmin, donor, hospital) cannot be deleted

get.summary: List all users with filters and pagination
Get full request details with donations
Get donations for a specific request
List critical and high urgency active requests

post.summary: Book a donor appointment with a hospital

example.notes: First-time donor, available in the morning.

404.description: Hospital, donor, or request not found

409.description: Active appointment already exists for this hospital

get.summary: Get available appointment slots for a hospital on a given date

post.summary: Verify donor QR code at hospital check-in
post.description:
Hospital staff scans the donor's QR code to confirm the donation.
- Validates the QR token, checks expiry and one-time usage
- Marks the appointment as completed
- Creates a Donation record
- Updates donor statistics and triggers reward/badge flow

**Role required:** hospital | admin | superadmin

qrToken.description: The secure QR token scanned from the donor's device

400.description:
One of:
- qrToken is required
- QR code expired
- Appointment is cancelled
- Appointment is not active

403.description: Donor is not eligible to donate

post.summary: Register a new donor or hospital account
post.description: Create a new account as donor or hospital. Donor signup requires phoneNumber, dateOfBirth, bloodType. Hospital signup requires hospitalName, licenseNumber

201.description: User registered successfully - Email verification processed

post.summary: Donor login with email and password
post.description: Authenticate as a donor user. Returns JWT token. Supports optional 2FA

403.description: Email not verified or account suspended

post.summary: Hospital login with email and password
post.description: Authenticate as a hospital user. Returns JWT token

403.description: Email not verified or hospital not approved

post.summary: Admin/Superadmin login with email, password, and adminKey
post.description: Authenticate as admin or superadmin. Requires email, password, and adminKey secret

200.description: Admin login successful or 2FA verification required

post.summary: Validate current JWT and return session state
Confirm 2FA setup for the authenticated user
Complete login by verifying a 2FA code

get.description: Public endpoint to discover hospitals. Search and filter by city, governorate, or keywords. Results include hospital contact information and blood inventory status

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search hospitals by name or keywords

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Legacy pagination - number of items to skip. Still supported for compatibility

get.summary: List nearby hospitals by GPS coordinates
get.description: Find hospitals within a specified radius from given GPS coordinates. Returns hospitals sorted by distance. Supports both lat/long and legacy latitude/longitude parameters

parameters.name: lat
parameters.description: Hospital latitude coordinate (-90 to 90). Alias for latitude.

parameters.name: long
parameters.description: Hospital longitude coordinate (-180 to 180). Alias for longitude.

parameters.name: latitude
parameters.description: Hospital latitude coordinate (deprecated, use lat instead)

parameters.name: longitude
parameters.description: Hospital longitude coordinate (deprecated, use long instead)

get.summary: Search hospitals by keyword, blood type, and availability

post.summary: Validate if a donor can donate for a given hospital and date
Confirm a donation by scanning an appointment QR token

get.summary: Get donor appointments via the donations compatibility alias

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated donor's profile information including blood type, availability status, and location

put.description: Update donor profile information such as name, phone, blood type, gender, location, and availability

400.description: Invalid profile data or validation error

get.summary: List active donation requests available to donors
get.description: Retrieve paginated list of blood and organ donation requests that match donor eligibility criteria. Filters by type and urgency

get.summary: List donation requests matched to the authenticated donor

400.description: Invalid request or eligibility check failed

get.summary: List donation history for the authenticated donor
Get the authenticated donor health history

patch.summary: Update the authenticated donor health history

get.summary: Get donor notification and preference settings

get.description: Returns totalDonations, points balance, and livesSaved. Used in home header and profile stats row.

get.summary: Get donor rewards and badge progress
get.description: Returns current points, earned badges, locked badges with progress, and next milestone.

get.summary: Get donor donation history with pointsEarned
get.description:
Paginated donation history for the authenticated donor.
Each record includes `pointsEarned` calculated from the points transaction log.
Returns a stored help document, or 404 if that document has not been configured.
Retrieve the authenticated hospital's profile information including license, contact details, blood inventory, and location coordinates

put.description: Update hospital information including name, contact number, address, location coordinates (lat/long), and license number

400.description: Invalid profile data or validation error

post.description: Create a blood or organ donation request with type, urgency, required blood types, and deadline

get.summary: List requests created by the authenticated hospital
Get details for a specific hospital request

403.description: Role not allowed or unauthorized access

put.summary: Update the status of a hospital request

403.description: Role not allowed or unauthorized access
Role not allowed or unauthorized access

get.summary: List donations for the authenticated hospital's requests
Get a read-only blood inventory summary for the authenticated hospital
Get donor's points summary and tier
Get full rewards screen data in one request
get.description:
Returns all data needed to render the Rewards screen in a single call:
current points, rewards catalog, points history (last 10), and badge progress.
Returns current points, next reward distance, badge counts, and completion percentage.

get.summary: Get all badges and donor's progress

200.description: Badge list with unlock status and progress

delivery_contact.description: Email address if delivery_preference is EMAIL

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of top donors to return

200.description: Ranked list of top donors by lifetime points

post.summary: Manually adjust a donor's points (admin only)

amount.description: Positive to add, negative to deduct

200.description: Top rewards, tier distribution, total points issued

post.description: Authenticated submissions are linked to the current user id, email, and role for traceability.
